contract for invariant testing of DidManifestRegistry.      The Foundry invariant fuzzer calls functions on this handler contract      (not the registry directly). The handler:        - Acts as the registry owner so it can call write functions        - Maintains a \"ghost state\" mirror that tracks what should be in the registry        - Exposes helpers so the invariant test can query ghost state      Ghost state allows the invariant test to assert things like      \"every key I think is stored actually IS stored with a non-empty CID\".","kind":"dev","methods":{"excludeArtifacts()":{"details":"Returns artifact identifiers configured via `excludeArtifact`."},"excludeContracts()":{"details":"Returns contract addresses configured
